evidence: "A dark South African urban legend film!"
"Good story, acting, soundtrack...and subtitles were perfect!"
"Brilliant film. I can only say it’s a thrill ride!"
"Tense! Very tense! Very good acting! Beautifully filmed!"
"Excellent soundtrack that pulls you in and out of tension."
"Excellent soundtrack that pulls you in and out of tension."
"I’d love to know who did the Morphine-ish bass/sax/trumpet driven soundtrack."
"A beautiful story. I can't imagine the reality of it, except...for the spirit. Truly inspiring!"
"Hit the right nerve kind of movie!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror, thriller, and sci-fi genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They appreciate atmospheric music and emotional depth in films, indicating a taste for engaging and immersive storytelling.
